summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard for matrimonial platform completed successfully. All 23 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components and navigation working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API responses are properly serialized excluding MongoDB _id
Environment variables are used correctly for API URLs
seed_data_creation: Test data already seeded: 30 users, 30 profiles, 12 subscriptions, 8 boosts, 5 matches, 4 reported profiles
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin dashboard features tested and working. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend UI components render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Charts (recharts) render correctly. Export functionality (CSV, Excel, PDF) working.
